overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars action-adventure game showing a Jedi character exploring a rocky alien desert canyon at night. The scene features multiple moons in the sky, dramatic rock formations, and the character eventually drawing a lightsaber while traversing the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert canyon passage with large moon visible overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon toward distant rock formations, with a large moon visible to the left

entered.detail: large pale moon or planet dominating the left side of the night sky
tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rock wall forming the right boundary of the passage
natural rock arch formation visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a narrow desert canyon at night, flanked by tall rock walls. A massive moon hangs in the sky to the left, illuminating the dusty path ahead. The environment is quiet and empty, with sparse desert vegetation scattered on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding canyon path opening into wider area

events.description: character makes a sharp left turn, changing direction through the canyon

agents.ego_description: turning left and continuing to explore the canyon, moving toward a narrower passage ahead

entered.detail: tall cliff face visible ahead at the end of the canyon path

segments.scene_description: The character turns left, moving into a wider section of the canyon. The large moon is no longer visible as the character faces a new direction. The path continues between the rock walls, which now appear more distant on the left side, leading toward a narrow passage ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with weapon drawn

events.description: character draws a white lightsaber, illuminating the immediate surroundings

agents.ego_description: cautiously advancing through the canyon with lightsaber drawn, ready for potential threats

entered.detail: glowing white curved lightsaber blade held in the character's right hand
two smaller celestial bodies visible in the sky to the left

segments.scene_description: The character draws a white lightsaber and continues moving through the narrow canyon. The weapon casts a soft glow on the rocky ground. Two smaller moons become visible in the distant sky as the character approaches the left canyon wall, which now looms closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate desert canyon at night that shifts from a moonlit trek into a focused advance with a glowing weapon. It begins with the character walking steadily through a narrow passage flanked by tall rock walls, with a massive moon illuminating the dusty path and sparse vegetation. As the character turns left, the scene opens into a wider section of the canyon where the large moon disappears from view and the rock walls recede. The camera then follows the character as they draw a white lightsaber, which casts a soft glow on the rocky ground while the path narrows once more. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the looming left canyon wall as two smaller moons emerge in the distant night sky.
